parameters.query:
SELECT
  b.id,
  b.name,
  COALESCE(
    b.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(b.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug
FROM bodies b
JOIN systems s
  ON s.id = b.system_id
JOIN active_systems asys
  ON asys.id = s.id
WHERE COALESCE(b.metadata->>'is_available_live','1') = '1'
ORDER BY s.name, b.name;

SELECT
  b.id,
  b.name,
  COALESCE(
    b.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(b.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug,
  s.name                   AS system_name,
  b.metadata->>'id'        AS uex_body_id,
  b.body_type      AS body_kind,     -- e.g. planet / moon (adjust if your metadata key differs)
  COALESCE(loc.locations_total, 0)          AS locations_total,
  COALESCE(loc.locations_list, '[]'::jsonb) AS locations_list
FROM bodies b
JOIN systems s
  ON s.id = b.system_id
JOIN active_systems asys
  ON asys.id = s.id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    l.body_id,
    COUNT(*) AS locations_total,
    jsonb_agg(l.name ORDER BY l.name) AS locations_list
  FROM locations l
  WHERE
    COALESCE(l.metadata->>'is_available_live','1') = '1'
  GROUP BY l.body_id
) AS loc
  ON loc.body_id = b.id
WHERE b.id = '{{$json["id"]}}';
